name: Fast Payday Loans, INC.
description_short: Florida-only payday lender offering cash advances up to $1,000 with no credit check, same-day funding, and ~25 store locations statewide.
description_long:
Fast Payday Loans, Inc. is a direct short-term payday lender operating exclusively in Florida, with approximately 25 physical store locations across the state. The company claims over 30 years in the loan industry, though an exact founding year has not been independently verified. It operates under the regulatory oversight of the Florida Office of Financial Regulation, Division of Consumer Finance — a state licensing requirement for payday lenders, not a voluntary consumer-protection certification. The company is not BBB-accredited and holds no CDFI, HUD, or NFCC designations, which are generally associated with non-profit or mission-driven lenders.

The company's core product is a single-payment cash advance loan of up to $1,000, secured against the borrower's next paycheck. Pricing is straightforward: a 10% transaction fee on the loan amount plus a $5.00 database verification fee per loan. On a $1,000 advance, total fees come to $105. Like all Florida payday loans, these are short-term instruments — typically repaid in full on the borrower's next payday, roughly 14 days out — and Florida law prohibits rollovers or extensions. Borrowers must fully repay before taking a new loan. There are no installment plans, title loans, or credit-building products. The application begins online at fastpaydayloansfloridainc.com but must be finalized in person at a Florida branch; the company claims the full process takes under 30 minutes.

Fast Payday Loans differentiates itself primarily on accessibility and speed. It approves applicants regardless of credit history — no credit check is performed — making it reachable to borrowers who cannot qualify for traditional bank products. With roughly 25 Florida locations, in-store availability is broader than most regional payday operators. Third-party review aggregators reflect consistently positive service experiences: a 5.0/5 Google rating from over 511 reviews, approximately 4.5 stars on Yelp, and 5-star Birdeye profiles across individual location pages with hundreds to over 1,000 reviews per location. Staff responsiveness and fast turnaround are the most frequently cited positives.

The honest assessment is that Fast Payday Loans serves a narrow but real need: immediate cash for Florida residents with no other credit options. However, the product carries the structural drawbacks inherent to payday lending. A 10% fee on a 14-day loan translates to an annualized rate in the range of 260–390% APR — the Florida statewide average is approximately 304% — making it expensive if used repeatedly. There is no money-back guarantee, no hardship accommodation, and no path to building credit through this lender. It is best used as a one-time emergency bridge, not a recurring financial tool. Borrowers outside Florida cannot use this service at all.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back or satisfaction guarantee identified.

tiers.name: Cash Advance Loan
features: 10% transaction fee on loan amount (e.g., $100 on a $1,000 loan)
Full repayment due on next payday — no installments

certifications: Florida Office of Financial Regulation licensed

pros: No credit check — approves applicants with bad, thin, or no credit history
~25 physical Florida store locations for in-store service statewide
Entire process — application to cash — claimed to take under 30 minutes
Simple, transparent fee structure: 10% of loan + $5 verification fee, no hidden charges
5.0/5 Google rating from 511+ reviews; consistent praise for staff and speed
Over 30 years of claimed experience in the Florida short-term loan market
cons: Effective APR on a 14-day loan is approximately 260–390% — among the most expensive legal borrowing available
Florida residents only — no service available in any other state
No rollover or extension allowed; full repayment required on next payday with no flexibility
Must visit a physical store to complete the loan — online application alone is insufficient
No BBB accreditation; BBB rating listed as insufficient information for some locations
No credit-building benefit — on-time repayment is not reported to credit bureaus
best_for: Florida residents facing a short-term cash emergency who have no access to bank loans or credit cards
Borrowers with poor or no credit history who need funds within the same day
People who can repay the full loan amount plus fees on their next paycheck and do not need installment flexibility
Consumers who prefer in-person service and live near one of the ~25 Florida store locations
diagnosis: Fast Payday Loans, Inc. is genuinely best suited for Florida residents in a one-time cash emergency who have no other borrowing options and can repay the full balance within two weeks. The main caveat is cost: at roughly 300% APR, repeated use creates a debt cycle that can be financially damaging — this product is a short-term bridge, not a financial solution.
services: Payday loans / cash advances up to $1,000
In-store loan finalization at ~25 Florida locations
